summary: Testing completed for Payroll Summary (Current Pay Period display) and Mileage Tracking features. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all required features work correctly.

details: Payroll Summary section expandable and shows prominently
Current Pay Period displayed: 'Feb 18 - Mar 3, 2026'
Hours tracked displayed: '11.3 hrs tracked'
Pay Period Settings visible with Start Date input pre-filled: '01/21/2026'
Save button for Pay Period Settings works
Three summary cards: Current Pay Period ($225.00), This Month ($225.00), This Year ($225.00)
Mileage Tracking section visible and expandable
GPS Trip Tracking area with 'Start Trip' button
Manual Entry button opens form modal
Date input field pre-filled with current date
Start Location input field with placeholder
End Location input field with placeholder
Total Miles input field
Purpose dropdown with three options: Thrifting, Post Office, Other
Notes (optional) input field
Save Entry button
Total Miles (This Year): 20.5
Total Trips: 2
IRS Rate (2024): $0.67/mile
Est. Deduction: $13.74
Recent Trips list displays mileage entries
Entry shows purpose badge (Thrifting, Post Office)
Entry shows date, From/To addresses, miles
Edit button (pencil icon) opens Edit Mileage Entry modal
Delete button (trash icon) visible
Edit modal pre-fills entry data and has Update Entry button

passed_tests: Frontend: Current Pay Period prominently displayed with dates
Frontend: Pay Period Settings with Start Date pre-filled
Frontend: Manual Entry button opens modal
Frontend: Purpose dropdown has Thrifting, Post Office, Other options
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Miles, Total Trips, IRS Rate, Est. Deduction
Frontend: Recent Trips list displays entries
Frontend: Edit button opens Edit Mileage Entry modal with pre-filled data
Frontend: Delete button visible on entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: Payroll Summary with prominent Current Pay Period display (Feb 18 - Mar 3, 2026, 11.3 hrs tracked) and Pay Period Settings with Start Date input. Mileage Tracking section fully functional with GPS Start Trip button, Manual Entry modal with Purpose dropdown (Thrifting, Post Office, Other), Summary cards (Total Miles: 20.5, Total Trips: 2, IRS Rate: $0.67/mile, Est. Deduction: $13.74), and Recent Trips list with Edit/Delete functionality. All backend mileage CRUD APIs working correctly.
